name: J.K Rowling
bio: British author best known for creating the Harry Potter series, one of the most popular and influential fantasy stories in the world.

name: Chetan Bhagat
bio: Indian author and columnist known for commercial fiction that speaks to young, urban India.

name: Arundhati Roy
bio: Indian author celebrated for her lyrical, socially engaged literary fiction and essays.

name: Sun Tzu
bio: Ancient Chinese military strategist and author of The Art of War, one of the most influential treatises on strategy ever written.

name: Morgan Housel
bio: Financial writer and partner at The Collaborative Fund, known for behavioral finance writing.

name: William Shakespeare
bio: English playwright and poet, widely regarded as the greatest writer in the English language.

name: Mark Twain
bio: American writer, humorist, and author of The Adventures of Tom Sawyer.

name: George Bellairs
bio: Pen name of British crime novelist Harold Blundell, known for classic detective fiction.
